caption: A reporter and a man are being interviewed on a soccer field with a stadium crowd and red seating in the background. The reporter, on the left, wears a dark blue suit, white shirt, and blue tie, holding a microphone with a white windscreen featuring a circular logo. The man being interviewed, on the right, is dressed in a dark navy suit, white shirt, and dark tie, and also holds a matching microphone. A Real Madrid crest is visible in the upper right corner of the scene. In the background, a banner displays the word "WELCOME". Across the sequence, the reporter remains relatively still while looking toward the man. The man's expression shifts from a serious, attentive look to a smile and a laugh, before returning to a neutral expression as he begins to speak. A large professional camera is partially visible in the left foreground.
